examples: You appear haughty, too much and you are inquisitive.
Cats are typically known for being very inquisitive and so are the Savannahs.
The inquisitive were shooed away by five young guards who lolled in the shade of a litchi tree.
In the 19th century, economics was a pastime of inquisitive gentlemen, a branch of philosophy.
He was so inquisitive and his favorite thing to do was hatching Monarch butterflies.
